title: Run Diff (was: Semantic Diff)
summary: Module 06 produces a structured record of what changed in code during each agent run. Implementation: hooks-bridge captures `git rev-parse HEAD` at SessionStart (runs.base_sha), runs `git diff <baseSha>` at SessionEnd scoped to files the agent touched in run_events Edit/Write tool calls, persists the unified diff + per-file metadata to a new run_diffs table, and surfaces the row to consumers (auto-context-pack digest section, MCP tool query_run_diff, web-v2 /runs/[id]/diff page). Renamed from 'Semantic Diff' to 'Run Diff' because git diff is the right tool — universal, lossless, format every consumer (agent + human) already speaks. Server-side computation is purely deterministic (git, no AST, no LLM); the agent reads the structured output and writes its own narrative recap into save_context_pack. ADR-013 records the supersede of ADR-002's Python claim and the rejection of tree-sitter / external LLM for this module.
supersedes: Original M06 plan ('Semantic Diff' Python FastAPI + tree-sitter + Anthropic enrichment service)
